# anyscale_user_groups (Data Source)

**BETA FEATURE**: Use this data source to retrieve a list of all user groups in your organization. User groups are typically synced from your identity provider (IdP) via SCIM and are used for managing group-based permissions on resources.



<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Read-Only

- `groups` (Attributes List) List of user groups in the organization. (see [below for nested schema](#nestedatt--groups))

<a id="nestedatt--groups"></a>
### Nested Schema for `groups`

Read-Only:

- `created_at` (String) The timestamp when the group was created.
- `id` (String) The unique identifier of the user group (format: `ug_*`).
- `name` (String) The name of the user group.
- `org_id` (String) The organization ID this group belongs to.
- `updated_at` (String) The timestamp when the group was last updated.
